task.json metadata field; schema supports varchar(10) short_name field

GitHub: https://github.com/OS4ED/openSIS-Classic (version 9.2 released October 30, 2025); setup script line 76 sets app version to '9.2'
Verified via OpenSIS schema: school_periods table includes period_id, syear, school_id, sort_order, title, short_name, length, and other fields matching task requirements
task.json metadata contains exactly 7 period objects in expected_periods array

privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring school periods in OpenSIS v9.2, a real open-source Student Information System. The expected_periods metadata specifies 7 periods: Period 1-3 (55 min each), Lunch (30 min), Period 4-6 (55 min each). All field names (sort_order, title, short_name, length) are verified to exist in the actual OpenSIS school_periods table schema. Database credentials (opensis_user / opensis_password_123 / opensis database) are verified in the setup scripts. All data is synthetic—the school (Demo School, school_id=1) and periods are demo data created for this benchmark task, not from a real school.
